must_haves: LLM API experience (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent
nice_to_haves: experience building conversational BI or clienteling tools
familiarity with design workflows or creative teams
experience working in a CEO's office or directly with executives
hidden_expectations: cross-functional collaboration across design, store, and business teams
high aesthetic sensibility to build brand-consistent frontends
self-starter in an ambiguous, fast-paced environment
disqualifiers: no engineering degree from top-tier institution
